_readme: Ollama preset. Run: ollama serve (OpenAI-compatible at :11434). Point the executor/classifier there and map your pulled models into tiers. Local models cost $0. Env: LLMOPS_MODEL_CONFIG=configs/ollama.json LLMOPS_LOCAL_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 LLMOPS_LOCAL_MODEL=qwen2.5-coder:14b LLMOPS_CLASSIFIER_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434/v1 LLMOPS_CLASSIFIER_MODEL=llama3.2:3b
